decision.summary: Open the daily 79k reach: BTC is pressing the session highs, the April 26 board is live, and 79k remains the closest clean upside strike for the current intraday continuation.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean and the account is flat. Binance is showing a bullish short-term tape: BTC spot is 78114.66, only 0.11% below the 24h high, with a positive 12h and 24h trend and price pushing the top of the recent range. The latest Beecthor transcript from April 25 keeps the macro bias bearish, but it still allows for one more upside cleanup before the larger drop, which makes a same-day 79k reach a valid momentum expression rather than a contradiction of the map. On the April 26 daily board, 79k reach is the closest clean upside target at roughly 41%, while the thesis-side bearish alternative, 77k dip at roughly 37%, would require a meaningful reversal from near-current highs and is less aligned with the live tape right now. Weekly entries are not in scope because only 16 hours remain in the weekly period, so the only clean opportunity is the daily momentum slot. Portfolio value is still below the $15 early-stage threshold, so stake stays capped at $1. The right move is to open the daily 79k reach with explicit acceptable expiry validity so the validator can process it correctly.
